name: sentinel-coinbase-demo
description: End-to-end demo: an AI agent with a Coinbase wallet, gated by the Sentinel action-gate.

scripts.sidecar: cd ../sentinel && SENTINEL_SECOND_OPINION_PROVIDER=mock SENTINEL_DATABASE_URL=memory npm run sidecar

comment: Live Coinbase mode (DEMO_MODE=live) additionally needs: npm i @coinbase/cdp-sdk
